title: Dunning schedule catalogue
description: Pre-defined dunning cadences. The default (day+3/7/14/30/60) applies to all tiers. Enterprise tenants with invoice_dunning_advanced may activate one of the pre-built alternate schedules OR configure a custom one via settings. Every cadence stage carries a copy severity tone that bounds the InvoicePastDueNotification template — 'friendly' at day+3, escalating to 'final' at day+30, then 'collections' at day+60 when the collections integration is enabled.

default.description: Balanced cadence for most tenants. Not too aggressive; not too passive. Suitable for B2C subscriptions + individual customers.

stages.copy_summary: Reminder — your invoice from {issue_date} is now 3 days past due. Please pay when convenient.
Your invoice from {issue_date} is 7 days past due. Please pay to avoid interruption of service.
Your invoice from {issue_date} is now 14 days past due. Please contact support if there's an issue.
Final notice — your invoice from {issue_date} is 30 days past due. Service may be suspended if not paid within 7 days.
Your invoice will be referred to a collections agency in 3 days if not resolved. Please contact support urgently.

aggressive.description: Faster cadence for B2B with net-30 or net-60 terms where any past-due is unusual. Enterprise-only.

stages.copy_summary: Invoice past due by 1 day — please pay at your earliest convenience.

gentle.description: Slower cadence for tenants with tight-knit communities where a firm dunning tone would damage the relationship. Enterprise-only.

notes: The default schedule applies to all tiers. Only Enterprise with invoice_dunning_advanced entitlement may switch schedules.

Enterprise tenants may also configure a completely custom schedule via settings.dunning.cadence (an array of days). The severity tones auto-map by day count: <7 = friendly; 7-14 = reminder; 15-30 = firm; 31-60 = final; > 60 = collections.
channels IN ('mail', 'in_app', 'push') — SMS is not shipped for dunning day-1 (compliance-sensitive; some jurisdictions restrict SMS dunning).
The dispatch job runs at 09:00 tenant-local time (per tenant.timezone) — dunning emails arrive at business hours regardless of tenant location.
